concerns.detail: Uses ableist slur '智障' (mentally disabled/retard) to attack professor's intelligence rather than concrete advising practices
Adds vulgar insult '傻逼' (stupid/idiot) comparing professor to entire department, constituting unsupported character judgment
concerns.excerpt: 应该是ucsd整个cse dept最傻逼的吧说真的

concerns.detail: Solicits personally identifying information by demanding a commenter reveal their real name to challenge their credentials
concerns.excerpt: 你有什么好paper实名列出来吧
